dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.connectionLost: Connection lost. Data may not be up to date.
dashboard.searchPlaceholder: Search by phone or patient name...
dashboard.emptyDescription: Start accepting new patients or wait for scheduled appointments.

walkIn.title: Create new visit
walkIn.description: Search and select a patient to create a walk-in visit
walkIn.errorToast: Could not create visit. Please try again.

noShow.title: Mark no-show
noShow.description: Confirm patient did not arrive for appointment
noShow.warning: Patient will be recorded as no-show. The appointment will be kept in the system for statistics. You can rebook for the patient later.
noShow.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: Called but could not reach...
noShow.errorToast: Could not mark no-show. Please try again.

cancelVisit.title: Cancel visit
cancelVisit.description: Confirm cancellation of visit for patient
cancelVisit.warning: Patient will be removed from today's queue. If the patient had an appointment, it will be marked as cancelled. This action cannot be undone.
cancelVisit.alreadyExamining: Patient has moved to In exam, cannot cancel.
cancelVisit.errorToast: Could not cancel visit. Please try again.
